title: crataegus divergens
intro: Crataegus divergens, also known as the divergent hawthorn, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree with medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, leaves, and fruits, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, contributing to its potential health benefits, including cardiovascular health, reduced blood pressure, and improved digestion. Herbal preparations of Crataegus divergens can be made into teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to support heart health, reduce symptoms of menopause, and alleviate stress.
